Variables.Name: ReflectionSourceType
Variables.Description: Indicates where to get the reflection source from.

Variables.Name: Cubemap
Variables.Description: Cubemap to use for reflection if ReflectionSourceType is set to RS_SpecifiedCubemap.

Variables.Name: SourceCubemapAngle
Variables.Description: Angle to rotate the source cubemap when SourceType is set to SLS_SpecifiedCubemap.

Variables.Name: Brightness
Variables.Description: A brightness control to scale the captured scene's reflection intensity.

Variables.Name: CaptureOffset
Variables.Description: World space offset to apply before capturing.
